violations.text: Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves in the snack isle have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025
